name: Brouwerij Handelsmaatschappij NV
summary: Brouwerij Handelsmaatschappij NV operates as a beer brewery primarily in Belgium. The company offers beers, lemonades and water, wines, and coffees. It operates under the Charles Quint, Mystic, SUPER 8, Tongerlo, Adler, Blonde, EUPENER BIER, Gildenbier, Maltosa, Primus, Speciale 1900, Star Blond, VAL, Fuerto, and CASTLE WINES brand names. The company was founded in 1893 and is based in Boortmeerbeek, Belgium. Brouwerij Handelsmaatschappij NV is a subsidiary of Finabra SA.
